name: Spiced Red Wine Fruit Soup with Candied Orange
recipeIngredient: 8 small Thin-skinned seedless Oranges or tangerines
12 Fresh mint leaves OR 2 tsp High-quality peppermint tea leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and slice the pineapple as described.
2. Scald, refresh, pat dry, and prepare the oranges as directed.
3. Prepare the orange syrup with sugar and zest, simmering until desired consistency is reached.
4. Peel, halve, core, and slice the pears.
5. Reduce red wine to 2 1/2 cups; add reserved syrup and bouquet garnish, then poach pears.
6. Puree candied orange slices and vanilla bean seeds with creme fraiche.
7. Assemble soup by placing poached pear slices in bowls, scattering fruit on top, ladling soup over each serving, and garnishing with mint leaves.
Serves 6-8
